zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Berkeley於大約1384年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東時，她的父親Sir John Berkeley33歲，母親Elizabeth de Betteshorne32歲。她於大約1423年與Richard de Poynings在英國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1455年8月1日在英國素可阿盧德爾享年72歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可阿盧德爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Berkeley于大约1384年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東时，她的父亲Sir John Berkeley33岁，母亲Elizabeth de Betteshorne32岁。她于大约1423年与Richard de Poynings在英国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1455年8月1日在英国素可阿盧德爾享年72岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可阿盧德爾。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Berkeley was born about 1384, in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Sir John Berkeley, was 33 and her mother, Elizabeth de Betteshorne, was 32. She married Richard de Poynings about 1423, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 1 August 1455, in Arundel, Sussex, England, at the age of 72, and was buried in Arundel, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Berkeley est née environ 1384, à Beverston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Berkeley, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Betteshorne, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Poynings environ 1423, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 1 août 1455, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Berkeley um 1384 in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Berkeley 33 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Betteshorne 32. Sie hat um 1423 in England Richard de Poynings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 1. August 1455 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Arundel, Sussex, England und wurde in Arundel, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Berkeley è nata il circa 1384 nel Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Sir John Berkeley, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Betteshorne, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Poynings circa 1423, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 1 agosto 1455, nel Arundel, Sussex, England, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a Arundel, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Berkeleyが約1384年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアベバーストンで生まれた時，父Sir John Berkeleyは33歳，母Elizabeth de Betteshorneは32歳であった。約1423年にイギリスでRichard de Poyningsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1455年8月1日にイギリススセックスアルンデルで72歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスアルンデルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Berkeley(이)가 대략 1384년 영국 그루스스터실르 비버스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Berkeley(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Betteshorne(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1423년 영국에서 Richard de Poynings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1455년 8월 1일 영국 수세스 아런들에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 아런들에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Berkeley nasceu aproximadamente 1384, em Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Berkeley, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Betteshorne, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Poynings aproximadamente 1423, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1 de agosto de 1455, em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Berkeley родилась около 1384 г. в местности бивирстон, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Berkeley было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Betteshorne, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Poynings около 1423 г. в местности Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 1 августа 1455 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Berkeley nació aproximadamente 1384, en Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Berkeley, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Betteshorne, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Richard de Poynings aproximadamente 1423, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 1 de agosto de 1455, en Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en Arundel, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
